<doctag><picture><loc_37><loc_33><loc_128><loc_50></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_388><loc_30><loc_464><loc_43>STUSB4500</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_418><loc_55><loc_464><loc_64>Datasheet</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_114><loc_73><loc_464><loc_83>Standalone USB PD sink controller with short-to-VBUS protections</section_header_level_1>
<picture><loc_48><loc_106><loc_158><loc_196></picture>
<section_header_level_1><loc_71><loc_233><loc_133><loc_239>Product status link</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_83><loc_243><loc_122><loc_249>STUSB4500</text>
<otsl><loc_35><loc_259><loc_167><loc_343><fcel>Order code<fcel>STUSB4500QTR<nl><ucel><fcel>STUSB4500BJR<nl><fcel>Description<fcel>Standalone USB PD  sink controller (auto-run  mode)<nl><fcel>Package<fcel>WLCSP-25  (2.6x2.6x0.5)<nl><fcel>Marking<fcel>4500<nl></otsl>
<section_header_level_1><loc_179><loc_101><loc_223><loc_109>Features</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_179><loc_121><loc_359><loc_128>· Dead battery mode support</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_129><loc_294><loc_135>· Up to 3 sink PDO configurable profiles</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_137><loc_388><loc_143>· Dual high power charging path support</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_145><loc_331><loc_151>· Integrated V$_{BUS}$ switch gate drivers (PMOS)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_153><loc_350><loc_159>· Integrated V$_{BUS}$ voltage monitoring</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_161><loc_320><loc_167>· Internal and/or external V$_{BUS}$ discharge paths</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_169><loc_355><loc_175>· Short-to-VBUS protections on CC pins (22 V)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_178><loc_354><loc_184>· High voltage capability on V$_{BUS}$ pins (28 V)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_186><loc_347><loc_192>· Dual power supply (V$_{SYS}$ and/or V$_{DD}$):</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_195><loc_329><loc_201>− V$_{SYS}$ = [3.0 V; 5.5 V]</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_203><loc_293><loc_209>− V$_{DD}$ = [4.1 V; 22 V]</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_212><loc_288><loc_218>− Debug accessory mode support</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_220><loc_308><loc_226>· Temperature range: -40 °C up to 105 °C</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_228><loc_336><loc_234>− ESD: 3 kV HBM - 1.5 kV CDM</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_236><loc_320><loc_242>− Certified:</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_244><loc_231><loc_250>−</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_252><loc_281><loc_258>USB Type-C™ rev 1.2</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_260><loc_332><loc_266>USB PD rev 2.0 (TID #1000133)</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_268><loc_318><loc_274>− Interoperable with USB PD rev 3.0</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_178><loc_284><loc_241><loc_292>Applications</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_179><loc_304><loc_305><loc_310>· Printers, camcorders, cameras</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_312><loc_382><loc_318>· IoT, drones, accessories and battery powered devices</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_320><loc_305><loc_326>· LED lighting and industrial</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_328><loc_298><loc_334>· Toys, gaming, POS, scanner</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_336><loc_314><loc_342>· Healthcare and handheld devices</list_item>
<list_item><loc_179><loc_344><loc_362><loc_350>· Any Type-C sink device up to 100 W (20 V; 5 A)</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_179><loc_359><loc_237><loc_367>Description</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_178><loc_376><loc_463><loc_401>The STUSB4500 is a USB power delivery controller that addresses sink up to 100 W (20 V; 5 A). It implements a proprietary algorithm to allow the negotiation of a power delivery contract with a source without MCU support (auto-run mode). PDO profiles are configured in an integrated non-volatile memory.</text>
<text><loc_178><loc_404><loc_462><loc_416>The device supports dead battery mode and is suited for sink devices powered from dead battery state and requiring high power charging profile to be fully operational.</text>
<text><loc_178><loc_419><loc_462><loc_440>Thanks to its 20 V technology, it implements high voltage features to protect the CC pins against short-circuits to V$_{BUS}$ up to 22 V and to support high voltage on the V$_{BUS}$ pins directly connected to the V$_{BUS}$ power path up to 28 V.</text>
<page_footer><loc_36><loc_488><loc_226><loc_497>DS12499 - Rev 8 - November 2022 For further information contact your local STMicroelectronics sales office.</page_footer>
<page_footer><loc_433><loc_488><loc_465><loc_493>www.st.com</page_footer>
</doctag>
